pilot_note: Category label corrected from user-supplied 'LDR' to actual GOV.
strm_coverage: None — sources (Evidence Act, DAMA, Gartner, Deloitte) have no STRM framework. Web research primary.

records.ksa_statement_excerpt: Knowledge of data and AI strategy development approaches, including strategy formulation methods, alignment with enterpr
records.web_evidence: 2025-2026 CDO job descriptions: strategic data/AI leadership, data governance oversight, board-level risk communication, organizational data strategy, enterprise AI adoption oversight, data monetization, investment portfolio management. CIO/Gartner/Coursera sources. Core competencies: judgment/decision-making 94%, complex problem-solving 85%, critical thinking 85%, financial resource management 81%. Specific: CDOs are universally expected to develop enterprise data and AI strategy aligned to business objectives.
records.inclusion_rationale: CDO must define data/AI strategy from first principles.
records.adversarial_challenge: Could be argued CDO inherits strategy from CEO/board rather than developing it.
records.adversarial_resolution: CDO owns data/AI strategy development — this is the primary mandate in every CDO job description.

records.ksa_statement_excerpt: Knowledge of data and AI governance structures at the board and executive committee level, including oversight responsib
records.web_evidence: 2025-2026 CDO job descriptions: strategic data/AI leadership, data governance oversight, board-level risk communication, organizational data strategy, enterprise AI adoption oversight, data monetization, investment portfolio management. CIO/Gartner/Coursera sources. Core competencies: judgment/decision-making 94%, complex problem-solving 85%, critical thinking 85%, financial resource management 81%. Specific: Data governance at board level is a core CDO responsibility per every surveyed JD (Gartner, CIO, Coursera).
records.inclusion_rationale: Board-level governance is a defining CDO accountability.
records.adversarial_challenge: CDO may not have board seat depending on organizational structure.
records.adversarial_resolution: CDO consistently interfaces with board on data risk and strategy even without formal board membership.

records.web_evidence: 2025-2026 CDO job descriptions: strategic data/AI leadership, data governance oversight, board-level risk communication, organizational data strategy, enterprise AI adoption oversight, data monetization, investment portfolio management. records.web_evidence: 2025-2026 CDO job descriptions: strategic data/AI leadership, data governance oversight, board-level risk communication, organizational data strategy, enterprise AI adoption oversight, data monetization, investment portfolio management. records.ksa_statement_excerpt: Knowledge of data and AI due diligence frameworks for mergers, acquisitions, and private equity transactions, including

records.ksa_statement_excerpt: Knowledge of AI governance structures and framework components, including model risk management, AI lifecycle oversight,
records.web_evidence: 2025-2026 CDO job descriptions: strategic data/AI leadership, data governance oversight, board-level risk communication, organizational data strategy, enterprise AI adoption oversight, data monetization, investment portfolio management. Specific: AI governance framework knowledge cited as essential for CDOs managing AI adoption.
records.inclusion_rationale: CDO must understand AI governance structures to lead enterprise AI adoption.
records.adversarial_challenge: Could be argued AI governance sits with a separate CAIO or Chief AI Officer.

records.ksa_statement_excerpt: Knowledge of responsible AI principles, their operationalization, and audit methods, including fairness metrics and metr

Specific: Responsible AI principles cited universally in 2025-2026 CDO competency frameworks.

records.adversarial_challenge: Responsible AI could be a standalone ethics function.
records.adversarial_resolution: Data is the substrate of all AI — CDO cannot delegate responsible AI without abdicating data accountability.

records.web_evidence: 2025-2026 CDO job descriptions: strategic data/AI leadership, data governance oversight, board-level risk communication, organizational data strategy, enterprise AI adoption oversight, data monetization, investment portfolio management.
